characters.appearance: Young woman with light skin and freckles. She has a distinctive green bob haircut and simple facial features.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a solid purple long-sleeve shirt throughout the video.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged man with dark skin, black hair, and a prominent, thick black mustache. He has a sturdy build.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a pink button-down shirt with the sleeves rolled up, green pants, and a brown belt.

characters.appearance: A stylized green owl with a rounded body, large expressive eyes, and an orange beak and feet.
Young man with light skin, orange hair, glasses, and a small orange mustache.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a simple green shirt.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Okay so... मुझे पता चला है कि Supernova में अब AI speaking practice है। [Okay so... I found out Supernova has AI speaking practice now.]
Character A says: ये beginners और advanced दोनों के लिए है। [It's for both beginners and advanced learners.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by announcing a major new feature.
- Establishes the app's versatility for all skill levels.
- Sets a confident, conversational tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Practice Modes
New Modes
Grammar
Vocabulary
AI Interview
NEW
Okay so... I found out Supernova has AI speaking practice now.
Start speaking
I am an outstanding AI tutor.
It's for both beginners and advanced learners.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: इनका AI Tutor आपका welcome करता है। [Their AI Tutor welcomes you.]
Character A says: वो Supernova का resident expert है... [He's Supernova's resident expert...]
Character A says: और थोड़ा strict भी... [and a little strict too...]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the AI tutor persona.
- Recontextualizes the stern character as a strict but effective English coach.
- Builds anticipation for the learning experience.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Their AI Tutor welcomes you.
Hello. I am your AI English Coach.
He's Supernova's resident expert
and a little strict too...

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: वो आपकी English analyze करके आपको सही level पे डालता है। [He analyzes your English and puts you in the right level.]
Character A says: शुरुआत में वो बहुत gentle होता है। [In the beginning, he is very gentle.]
Character A says: फिर असली interview questions शुरू होते हैं। [Then the real interview questions begin.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Explains the personalized onboarding and leveling system.
- Highlights the progression from easy practice to challenging, real-world pressure.
- Shows the practical value of the AI tutor.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
How is your English?
I'm a total beginner

Introduce yourself confidently. Let's go!
In the beginning, he is very gentle.
Then the real interview questions begin.
Let's see how you handle this question.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: पर उसे क्या पता... [But little does he know...]
Character A says: मैं रोज़ practice करती हूँ। [I practice every day.]
Character A says: Pressure में ही तो मज़ा आता है। [The real fun is under pressure.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shifts focus back to the user's growing confidence.
- Emphasizes the importance of daily practice.
- Turns the intimidation factor into an empowering challenge.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
But little does he know...
I practice every day.
The real fun is under pressure.
confident

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: हर conversation के साथ, आपका confidence बढ़ेगा। [With every conversation, your confidence will rise.]
Character A says: और जब आप ready हों, [And when you're ready,]
Character A says: वो आपको real-world situations के लिए तैयार करेगा। [he'll prepare you for real-world situations.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Replaces PvP gaming with real-world speaking simulations (interviews, clients).
- Shows tangible progress (confidence/fluency score rising).
- Demonstrates the practical application of the app's lessons.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: अब जिस दिन मुझे interviews crack करने से break चाहिए होता है, [Now on days when I need a break from cracking interviews,]
Character A says: मैं casual English practice पे आ जाती हूँ। [I hop over to casual English practice.]
Character A says: क्योंकि अगर clients से बात करनी ही है... [Because if I have to talk to clients...]
Character A says: तो पूरे confidence के साथ करनी चाहिए ना। [might as well do it with full confidence, right.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the variety of courses (switching from formal interview prep to casual English).
- Replaces aggressive 'trash talk' with the empowering goal of speaking to clients confidently.
- Reinforces the app's career and lifestyle benefits.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
AI Interview
Casual English
Course
Now on days when I need a break from cracking interviews,
I hop over to casual English practice.
Because if I have to talk to clients...
might as well do it with full confidence, right.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Anyways, मुझे तो इसकी आदत हो गयी है। [Anyways, I'm officially obsessed.]
Character A says: अगर आप भी मेरी तरह, [If you also want to speak fluent English,]
Character A says: fluent English बोलना चाहते हैं, [like me,]
Character A says: तो आपको पता है कहाँ आना है। [you know where to find us.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a strong, relatable endorsement from the user.
- Provides a clear call-to-action for the audience to download the app.
- Ends on a high-energy, confident note.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Anyways, I'm officially obsessed.
If you also want to speak fluent English,
like me,
you know where to find us.
Supernova
